description: Browse the web, directly from Cursor etc.

findings.title: Arbitrary Code Execution: browser automation server capable of executing scripts in page context
findings.description: browser-use-mcp-server provides browser automation that includes JavaScript execution in page contexts via execute_script and similar tools. Any agent with access can run arbitrary code inside the browsed page.
findings.recommendation: Gate behind REQUIRE_APPROVAL. Restrict agent access to the execute_script tool. Log and audit all script execution calls.
